  "findings": [
    "Over-greasing has caused a purged seal, compromising the sealing integrity and risking bearing overheating."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop greasing immediately.",
    "Relieve internal pressure by removing the grease relief plug while running the equipment to purge excess grease.",
    "Clean the purged grease from the housing and inspect the seal for permanent deformation or damage.",
    "Replace the seal if it has been blown out or damaged by the pressure."
  ],
  "rationale": "Over-greasing creates excessive pressure that blows out (purges) contact seals and causes rapid heat buildup due to fluid shear. Before work can continue or the asset is returned to service, the excess grease must be vented, pressure relieved, and the seal inspected for physical damage or displacement.",
  "references": [
    "SKF Bearing Installation and Maintenance Guide",
    "Timken Engineering Manual: Lubrication and Seals"
  ]
}
